name_cn:
Kelly elan Golden Brown·Silver
Imported cowhide, cross-grain, hand-waxed thread, full metal hardware
Detachable shoulder strap, two carrying methods: handbag and underarm bag. Great capacity, incredibly comfortable to carry!!
Dimensions: 27x15x5
